notes: Shared styles: custom presets now live next to the shared library folder (Google Drive/Dropbox), so the whole team sees each other's styles just like bodies & packshots. Official presets keep shipping with updates. If no shared library is set, custom styles fall back to a persistent local folder. Update fix: removed heavy game-sprite assets (Heroes/) from the repo — their non-ASCII filenames were breaking the unzip step of Update Assembler.command for some machines ('Illegal byte sequence'). Updates now download a lean package and install cleanly. Updater also hardened (UTF-8 locale + native ditto extractor). New Merge hooks button on the board: stitch all hooks (in order) into one long hook clip — with a 'Bake captions' toggle. Download it right away, and it's also added to the board as a reusable component. New Punctuation toggle in Smart captions: ON keeps punctuation as transcribed (commas, periods); OFF is the clean look — but abbreviation dots (U.S., e.g.) are always kept now. Your caption presets are now safe: they live in a persistent folder (~/.assembler/styles) instead of inside the code, so updates never wipe them again — and on this launch the app auto-recovers presets from the previous version. Keep-together now matches phrases with punctuation (e.g. 'U.S. National' stays whole). Manual line breaks no longer shrink captions to tiny — auto-shrink is skipped in manual mode and never goes below 55%. Clearer 'Assembler stopped' screen (reopen from Dock/Applications; Update.command hint). Gradients: new section — 2-color gradient (vertical/horizontal/diagonal) you can apply to the plate & word-plate, the active karaoke word, or all text. Localize removed from the left bar (LOC has its own screen). In LOC, Quit + settings sit by the version badge. Plus separate word/plate shadows, stroke master toggle.
